requirement_topic.en: Noise: No Qatar Outdoor-Equipment Product Marking
requirement_topic.zh: 噪声：卡塔尔无户外设备产品标识
requirement_topic.zht: 噪聲：卡塔爾無戶外設備產品標識

summary.en: Qatar does not operate an EU-style outdoor-equipment noise scheme （there is no Directive 2000/14/EC equivalent requiring a guaranteed sound-power level marked on the product）. Noise for power tools in Qatar is addressed mainly through GSO product standards that adopt IEC 62841 （which already specifies noise and vibration measurement and declaration in the manual） and through the Ministry of Labour occupational health and safety framework governing workplace noise exposure. There is therefore no separate Qatari outdoor-noise product label or conformity step to obtain.
summary.zh: 卡塔尔不实行欧盟式的户外设备噪声方案（不存在要求在产品上标注保证声功率级的 2000/14/EC 等效法规）。卡塔尔电动工具的噪声主要通过采纳 IEC 62841 的 GSO 产品标准处理（该标准已规定噪声和振动的测量并在手册中声明），并通过劳工部职业健康安全框架管理工作场所噪声暴露。因此不存在单独的卡塔尔户外噪声产品标签或需办理的符合性步骤。
summary.zht: 卡塔爾不實行歐盟式的戶外設備噪聲方案（不存在要求在產品上標註保證聲功率級的 2000/14/EC 等效法規）。卡塔爾電動工具的噪聲主要透過採納 IEC 62841 的 GSO 產品標準處理（該標準已規定噪聲和振動的測量並在手冊中聲明），並透過勞工部職業健康安全框架管理工作場所噪聲暴露。因此不存在單獨的卡塔爾戶外噪聲產品標籤或需辦理的符合性步驟。

standards_or_laws: No Qatar outdoor-equipment noise product marking scheme (no Directive 2000/14/EC equivalent)
GSO standards adopting IEC 62841 for tool noise and vibration measurement and manual declaration
Qatar Ministry of Labour occupational health and safety framework for workplace noise exposure

summary.en: China GB/T 3883 safety evidence usually focuses on electrical and mechanical hazards and includes noise and vibration measurement consistent with the IEC method. China also has its own workplace noise-exposure rules, but these are occupational, not a product noise-marking scheme.
summary.zh: 中国 GB/T 3883 安全证据通常侧重电气和机械危险，并包含与 IEC 方法一致的噪声和振动测量。中国亦有自身的工作场所噪声暴露规则，但这些属职业范畴，而非产品噪声标识方案。
summary.zht: 中國 GB/T 3883 安全證據通常側重電氣和機械危險，並包含與 IEC 方法一致的噪聲和振動測量。中國亦有自身的工作場所噪聲暴露規則，但這些屬職業範疇，而非產品噪聲標識方案。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 3883 series (noise and vibration measurement per the IEC method)
China workplace noise-exposure occupational rules where applicable

gap.en: Honestly, there is little Qatar-specific product gap here: an exporter does not need to obtain a Qatari outdoor-noise marking because none exists. The practical action is to keep the IEC 62841 noise and vibration declaration in the manual accurate, and to be aware that workplace noise duties fall on the Qatari employer under the Ministry of Labour framework, not on the imported product as a marking.
gap.zh: 坦白说，此处几乎没有卡塔尔特有的产品差距：出口商无需取得卡塔尔户外噪声标识，因为该标识并不存在。实务动作是保持手册中 IEC 62841 噪声和振动声明的准确性，并知悉工作场所噪声义务依劳工部框架由卡塔尔雇主承担，而非以标识形式落在进口产品上。
gap.zht: 坦白說，此處幾乎沒有卡塔爾特有的產品差距：出口商無需取得卡塔爾戶外噪聲標識，因為該標識並不存在。實務動作是保持手冊中 IEC 62841 噪聲和振動聲明的準確性，並知悉工作場所噪聲義務依勞工部框架由卡塔爾雇主承擔，而非以標識形式落在進口產品上。

target.en: Not a mandatory product-marking obligation: Qatar has no outdoor-equipment noise marking scheme. The applicable mandatory elements are the IEC 62841 noise and vibration declaration within product conformity and the Ministry of Labour occupational noise framework, which applies to the workplace rather than to the product label.
target.zh: 非强制产品标识义务：卡塔尔无户外设备噪声标识方案。适用的强制要素是产品符合性内 IEC 62841 的噪声和振动声明，以及适用于工作场所而非产品标签的劳工部职业噪声框架。
target.zht: 非強制產品標識義務：卡塔爾無戶外設備噪聲標識方案。適用的強制要素是產品符合性內 IEC 62841 的噪聲和振動聲明，以及適用於工作場所而非產品標籤的勞工部職業噪聲框架。

cn.en: China has no product outdoor-noise marking for these tools either; GB/T 3883 includes the IEC noise and vibration measurement method, and workplace noise rules are occupational.
cn.zh: 中国对这些工具同样没有产品户外噪声标识；GB/T 3883 包含 IEC 噪声和振动测量方法，工作场所噪声规则属职业范畴。
cn.zht: 中國對這些工具同樣沒有產品戶外噪聲標識；GB/T 3883 包含 IEC 噪聲和振動測量方法，工作場所噪聲規則屬職業範疇。

source.publisher: Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology (QGOSM), Ministry of Commerce and Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No separate Qatari outdoor-noise product marking is required; keep the IEC 62841 noise and vibration declaration accurate in the manual and treat workplace noise as the importer/employer's occupational duty under the Ministry of Labour framework, not as a product label gap.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 无需单独的卡塔尔户外噪声产品标识；应保持手册中 IEC 62841 噪声和振动声明准确，并将工作场所噪声视为劳工部框架下进口商/雇主的职业义务，而非产品标签差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 無需單獨的卡塔爾戶外噪聲產品標識；應保持手冊中 IEC 62841 噪聲和振動聲明準確，並將工作場所噪聲視為勞工部框架下進口商/僱主的職業義務，而非產品標籤差距。
